title: API contract sync
task: Add account preference fields to a backend endpoint and update the generated frontend client.
context: The endpoint, OpenAPI schema, typed client, and compatibility tests must ship together.

route.reason: The contract shape is the main decision, while client generation and compatibility tests reduce rollout risk.

omitted_skills.reason: This is a contract propagation task, not a visual design change.
No query performance concern is described.

public_safety.review_notes: Uses fictional account preference language only.
